SOURCE: 70089206.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (70089206.pdf)
SUMMARY: Highly skilled and results-oriented IT specialist with extensive experience in Software Development, Configuration Management, Project Management, System Planning & Specification Development, CMMI5, Quality Assurance and Testing.
SKILLS: Configuration Management, Process Development, Process Improvement, Database Management, Software Development, Software Testing, Serena Version Manager, Serena Business Manager, Serena Business Administrator, Reflections, WinSCP, JavaScript, LINUX, Oracle 10G Programming, Oracle JDeveloper, Java Programming, Object Oriented Programming, Intro to UNIX Systems, Advanced UNIX, Learning PERL, Advanced C Language Programming, Advanced PL/SQL Programming, Fundamentals of SAS, SQL Processing with SAS, SAS Programing, Table Processing with SAS, Output Delivery Systems, Utilizing VAX/VMS, Demand Terminal Language, Package References, Objects and Modules

SOURCE: 70089206.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Specialist
COMPANY: Current Company Name
DATES: August 2006 - Present
DESCRIPTION: ['Track and control over 150 change requests per month.', 'Manage repository for Software and Customer Requirements Documents, Agreements and Governance Specifications.', 'Document and communicate defects and problems with stakeholders and developers.', 'Develop and report critical metrics related to CRSMB change request activity.', 'Ensure software design, coding and testing activities are completed before releasing software.', 'Deploy application software using code management tools.', 'Manage logging of change requests into the tracking system and assign work activities.', 'Evaluate CM processes for improvement.', 'Coordinate with developers, subject matter personnel, stakeholders, database management support and project managers.', 'Performed platform testing and performance testing during migration to Serena Business Management (SBM) system.', 'Collaborated in design of SBM Workflow.', 'Administrator for the Serena Business Manager (SBM) System.', 'Proficient with Serena Version Manager, WinSCP, Reflections, JavaScript, LINUX, Oracle, PL/SQL, SAS, Visual Basic.']

SOURCE: 70089206.pdf
JOB TITLE: Computer Specialist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: August 1996 - August 2006
DESCRIPTION: ['Detailed and refined requirements, wrote algorithms, developed programs and command procedures.', 'Developed solutions to improve software performance.', 'Enhanced testing procedures.', 'Performed software testing, debugging, and validation using internally developed test scripts, test plans, and results criteria.', 'Developed and delivered software products.', 'Communicated with IT staff and subject matter on project requirements.', 'Conducted program demonstrations prior to the release of software.', "Performed extensive database testing, automated testing and data validation in support of MAF/TIGER database's migration to Oracle.", 'Worked extensively in PL/SQL, SQL, Shell scripting in LINUX, JavaScript, SAS, Visual Basic.']

SOURCE: 70089206.pdf
JOB TITLE: Computer Specialist
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: July 1994 - August 1996
DESCRIPTION: ['Designed and developed electronic questionnaires for Computer Assisted Survey Information Collection (CASIC) activities.', 'Led meetings with subject matter staff to review project status and proposed changes.', 'Met with the subject matter staff and sponsor on programming specifications, design and testing of CAI.', 'Delivered status reports to stakeholders for budgeting and planning purposes.', 'Collaborated with program sponsor to draft project schedules and plans.', 'Served as single point of contact for project scheduling and changes.']

SOURCE: 70089206.pdf
JOB TITLE: Program Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: February 1988 - July 1994
DESCRIPTION: ['Worked in the Research & Methodology Branch of the Industry Division.', 'Developed statistical methodology for designing a ratio estimation procedure.', 'Developed estimation and variance methodologies.', 'Designed computer algorithms for assigning sampling weights, nonresponse sample weight adjustment, and calculation of estimates, variances, and relative standard sampling errors.', 'Developed computer software needed for survey sample selection.', 'Provided programming expertise to assist subject matter analysts with software and instruments.']
